data.title: New CEO of Crypto Council for Innovation, Ji Hun Kim, appointed in Dec 2024 following departure of Sheila Warren.
data.description: In December 2024, Ji Hun Kim assumed the role of acting CEO of the Crypto Council for Innovation following the departure of Sheila Warren.

data.title: NWPX Infrastructure, Inc. will release Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 7th after market close, with conference call on Aug 8th at 7:00 a.m. PT.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, NWPX Infrastructure, Inc. will be releasing its financial results after the market closes. Following this, a conference call is scheduled to commence at 7:00 a.m. PT on August 8, 2025, to discuss these results. NWPX Infrastructure, Inc., based in Vancouver, Washington, is a prominent manufacturer of water-related infrastructure products. It is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol NWPX. The announcement was made on July 24, 2025.

data.title: CD40/CD40L inhibitors market grows due to advancing research in autoimmune diseases, cancer therapy.
data.description: The market for inhibitors targeting CD40/CD40L is seeing consistent growth due to a surge in research related to autoimmune diseases, organ transplants, and cancer immunotherapy. This growth is fueled by a rising incidence of rheumatoid arthritis, systemic lupus erythematosus, and other inflammatory disorders. As a result, the market is projected to reach a value of X billion dollars by 2025, with a compound annual growth rate of Y% from 2020 to 2025. This trend underscores the increasing demand for innovative treatments in the field of immunology.

data.title: Nelnet's division introduces Propelr, a new learning platform to enhance training and retention for workforce potential.
data.description: A new company, Propelr, has been launched by Nelnet Business Services, a division of Nelnet, Inc. The platform aims to empower human resources, training, and compliance leaders to improve training and increase retention. This announcement was made on July 24, 2025, by Nelnet, Inc. (NYSE: NNI).

data.title: Delta Dental of Colorado appoints Keith W. Phillips as CFO, beginning August 11, 2025, with 20+ years of finance experience.
data.description: Keith W. Phillips, who has over two decades of finance experience in different sectors, has been appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer of Delta Dental of Colorado (DDCO), starting from August 11, 2025. This announcement was made by DDCO on July 24, 2025, in Denver. Phillips will bring a wealth of knowledge to the role, having worked in finance for more than 20 years across a variety of industries.

data.title: Research shows centralized role of MEV arbitrageurs on Ethereum increasing, harming network decentralization due to exploiting price differences between exchanges.
data.description: New research has discovered that arbitrageurs taking advantage of price differences between centralized and decentralized cryptocurrency exchanges are having a negative impact on network decentralization. This detrimental effect is evident in the manipulation of prices and liquidity across various platforms. The study reveals that a significant number of arbitrageurs are contributing to the centralization of control in the crypto market, thus hindering the core principles of decentralization. This highlights the importance of addressing this issue to ensure the integrity and fairness of the cryptocurrency ecosystem.

data.title: DYDX price remains steady at $0.63 supported by regulatory compliance, with a 0.55% increase. MiCA-compliant whitepaper release and network upgrade propel long-term outlook.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DYDX is currently trading at $0.63, marking a modest increase of 0.55%. The release of a MiCA-compliant whitepaper and a network upgrade have enhanced the fundamentals of the currency. However, technical indicators remain mixed despite these positive developments.

data.title: In 2024, new NAR members are more diverse than experienced ones, as per the 2024 NAR Member Profile findings.
data.description: The 2024 NAR Member Profile report reveals an important trend - newly registered REALTORS® are displaying greater diversity compared to their more seasoned peers. This finding underscores the evolving demographics within the industry, highlighting a notable shift towards inclusivity. Specifically, the data shows that a significant proportion of new NAR members represent diverse backgrounds, reflecting a more varied representation within the real estate sector. This shift points to a potential transformation in the composition of real estate professionals, with a focus on embracing and empowering individuals from all walks of life. By embracing diversity, the real estate industry in 2024 is taking a step towards reflecting the rich tapestry of society.

data.title: Inflation calms down, paving way for Fed Reserve to start rate-cutting in September. By Lawrence Yun.
data.description: Breaking news from August 14, 2024 - The Consumer Price Index (CPI) reports a decrease in inflation, indicating a more stable economic environment. This development suggests that the Federal Reserve is likely to initiate a process of lowering interest rates starting in September. Renowned economist Lawrence Yun shared this analysis, signaling potential upcoming changes in the financial landscape.

data.title: US Pres reveals ‘Great Deal’ on trade with Indonesia, easing tariffs. Indonesia’s president praises Trump as ‘tough negotiator’. #TradeDeal
data.description: The recent agreement announced by President Trump involves a partial rollback of the steep tariffs that were threatened against the country last week. The Indonesian president referred to Mr. Trump as a skilled negotiator during the discussions.

data.title: Tariff confusion prevails as President Trump's abrupt changes leave trading partners in chaos, uncertain of his next move.
data.description: Confusing messages shared on social media, along with last-minute alterations during negotiations, have left trade partners uncertain about President Trump's intentions.

data.title: gategroup announces pricing for EUR 675M, USD 500M term loans, and CHF 300M revolving credit facility.
data.description: gategroup Holding AG, along with its subsidiaries, has revealed the pricing of a new financing package. This includes a term loan of EUR 675 million, a separate term loan totalling USD 500 million, and a multicurrency revolving credit facility worth CHF 300 million.
